title: Piece: Reforged
description: Addon for Mine Mine no Mi. New skills.
body:
Piece: Reforged

Piece: Reforged is a fan-made addon for Mine Mine no Mi, created to expand the world of Devil Fruits with new abilities, visual effects, particles, and entity-based models inspired by the style of Minecraft while keeping the feeling of the original mod.

This addon focuses on making each skill feel alive. Instead of simple invisible effects or plain particles, many abilities use custom visual entities, delicate models, and unique particle work to make combat more expressive, readable, and satisfying.


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

# Features

- New Devil Fruit abilities designed for Mine Mine no Mi.
- Custom entity-based effects with detailed models and animations.
- Unique particles for abilities such as snow, venom, ghosts, smoke, mochi, and weapon effects.
- Improved visual feedback for continuous and toggle-style skills.
- Skills that interact with mobs, players, and living entities.
- Carefully styled effects made to feel powerful without breaking the Minecraft aesthetic.

Requirements
- Minecraft Forge
- Minecraft 1.16.5
- Mine Mine no Mi

</details>




<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Doku Doku no Mi: Venom Crawlers

### Notes


Piece: Reforged is still growing. More abilities, refinements, models, particles, and balance changes may be added over time.

This project is an unofficial fan addon and is not affiliated with the creators of Mine Mine no Mi or One Piece.
